description.ko: AQUA-5는 심해의 막대한 압력을 견디도록 설계된 첨단 탐사 유닛으로, 내부의 생물 발광 코어에서 나오는 에너지를 통해 미지의 해저를 탐험합니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is an advanced deep-sea exploration unit designed to withstand the crushing pressures of the midnight zone, powered by an internal bioluminescent core.

prompt: A highly detailed cinematic shot of a futuristic submersible robot named AQUA-5, sleek metallic navy blue plating, glowing neon cyan bioluminescent accents, navigating through a dark abyssal trench, surrounded by glowing deep-sea flora and hydrothermal vents, 8k resolution, photorealistic, volumetric lighting, underwater particles.
